failedAssertions.reason: The required src/ token sweep still finds PIN-era strings inside src/__tests__/cross-area/no-leakage-flow.test.tsx, including hasPinSet, failedAttempts, lockedUntil, lockoutCycle, and a pin-hash leak-scan regex.
The contract-specified listTests grep still matches because Jest lists src/features/auth/screens/biometric-unlock-screen.test.tsx, which contains the substring unlock-screen.

The focused get-initial-route Jest suite passed all 17 tests and covers the route matrix, but the contract evidence is not fully met because src/features/session/get-initial-route.test.ts still references the legacy routes CreatePin and Unlock explicitly.

The contract rg scan still finds PIN/passcode strings under src/features/auth/screens/, including source comments and test assertions in biometric-setup, biometric-unavailable, and biometric-unlock files.
No src/ imports from '@/constants/auth' remain, but the removed-constants token scan still matches AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS in src/constants/auth.ts and in src/hooks/__tests__/use-auto-lock.test.tsx.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented onboarding-ux local validation constraints: the VAL-UX-004 listTests grep also matches biometric-unlock-screen.test.tsx, and broad negative token scans include test/comment text under src/.
